case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 1260-1440s emailservice metrics. Latency.p90 dev=+4422-+4521 and latency.p50 dev=+828-+3186 persist. Mem dev=+2.2 to +3.3 is minor. Traces show normal self latency. Root cause is emailservice latency.
Final RCA confirms emailservice latency (dev=+4400+) as primary cause. Traces show normal self latency, validating metrics-led hypothesis. Checkoutservice latency is secondary propagation.
